acceptance.claim: The authorized user can select the fixture repository and branch, tap Sync, and see the completed mirror success state.
After every remote file is read, the GitHub API sync repository removes local files, links, and directories absent from the remote tree.
The remote file tree wins when a local file conflicts with a remote directory or a local directory conflicts with a remote file.
A failed remote listing or file download does not start local cleanup, preserving local-only entries.
